title: cymbopappus piliferus
intro: Cymbopappus piliferus, also known as the prickly chrysanthemum, is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Cymbopappus piliferus include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are said to promote overall well-being and boost the immune system.
